title: viola × borussica
intro: Viola × borussica, also known as the hybrid viola, is a type of flowering plant that results from the crossbreeding of two different viola species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Viola × borussica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Viola × borussica can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to soothe skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
